    "Inspect condenser for blockage, debris, or damaged fins; clean or repair as needed.",

    "Re-test pressures and system performance after corrections."

  "rationale": "Both low and high-side pressures reading high-high is a classic indicator of restricted condenser airflow or refrigerant overcharge. This condition places excessive load on the compressor and can lead to catastrophic failure if left uncorrected. The asset is in service with an active fault, so the diagnosis is a fail until corrected.",
